JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD WEIL SUSAN K> PARKINSON ATTY FOR PLTF. DEFT. IN PRO PER 3:40 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PRESENT. IN CHAMBERS CASE SETTLED, TERMS AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. AND AGAINST DEFT. FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES. PLTF. WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS, DEFT WAIVES RIGHT TO SECURITY DEPOSIT AS WELL AS INTEREST. WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 9/5/93 5PM. DEFT WAIVED RIGHT FOR FURTHER STAY, THAT NO OTHER ADULT IN THE PREMISES, EACH SIDE TO WAIVE COSTS FEES. PLTF. TO PREPARE STIP & JUDGMENT.
